chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-8988 of 2018 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.39492/2018 2.For hearing of main case. 23.01.2025 Mr.Muhammad Ishaque & Mr.Waqar Ahmed Maitlo, Advocates for the Petitioner. Mr.Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Statement has been filed on behalf of Assistant Collector (Customs), Appraisement, Collectorate West, Karachi is taken on record. In view of the same, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
